_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Add Restart button to the synthetic Worktree Setup (S00) row

steps.description: Add restartable: bool = False to StepDetail dataclass; compute it in _synthetic_setup_step (true iff BatchItem.status in {setup_failed, failed} AND no WorkflowStep has progressed past pending). Add POST /project/{project_id}/api/item/{item_id}/restart-setup endpoint (precondition-gated, delegates to a new private helper extracted from full_restart_item) that performs worktree cleanup + step reset + item→approved + batch re-open + emits setup_restarted event. Register a 'restart-setup' entry in _ITEM_ACTION_LABELS so the existing confirm_item_dialog dispatcher renders the dialog (no new GET handler).
Review S01: precondition correctness, helper extraction (no behavior change in full_restart_item), event naming, no duplication of state-mutation logic

Add restart_setup_button(project_id, item_id) macro in action_button.html mirroring restart_merge_button (secondary bg, '↻ Restart Setup' label, hx-get to confirm dialog). Update item_overview.html line 95 to render the button when step.is_synthetic and step.step_id == 'S00' and step.restartable. No regression in existing button conditionals.
Review S03: macro reuse, no regression in existing conditionals, accessibility (title attr, aria-label if present), htmx target correctness

Unit tests for: _synthetic_setup_step.restartable parametrized over BatchItem statuses; restart_setup endpoint precondition pass/fail, worktree deletion, step reset, batch re-open, event emission; confirm-dialog GET returns fragment with expected text and POST target. Integration test for full filesystem-cleanup flow using a temp dir as worktree.
Review S05 tests for AC1–AC6 coverage and isolation
Cross-step global review: backend → templates → tests chain holds end-to-end; full_restart_item behavior unchanged

QV: Browser verification — Restart Setup button visible on a setup-failed S00 row, confirm dialog appears with the expected wording, click flow resets the item, no console errors, no regression on other action buttons
